allow: PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\HP\\Documents\\ArquiSoft_Tienda_de_Regalos; $base = git merge-base origin/main origin/juan-daniel; Write-Host "base commit: $base"; Write-Host "---"; $result = git merge-tree $base origin/main origin/juan-daniel 2>&1; if \($result -match "<<<<<<<"\) { Write-Host "HAY CONFLICTO. Detalle:"; $result | Select-String -Pattern "<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>" -Context 3,3 } else { Write-Host "Merge LIMPIO. Sin conflictos." })

PowerShell($response = curl.exe -s -o $null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/login; Write-Host "GET /login -> HTTP $response"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "--- logs despues del request ---"; docker compose logs frontend-ssr --tail=15)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3001/login -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - OK, pagina compila"; Write-Host "Content length: $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "--- logs frontend-ssr ---"; docker compose logs frontend-ssr --tail=20)

PowerShell(Write-Host "--- Probando con 90s de timeout \(Next.js dev mode compila en primer request\) ---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3001/login -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) en $\([math]::Round\($r.RawContentLength/1024,1\)\) KB" } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "--- logs ---"; docker compose logs frontend-ssr --tail=30)

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\HP\\Documents\\ArquiSoft_Tienda_de_Regalos; docker run --rm -v ${PWD}/api-gateway:/app -w /app node:18-alpine node --check index.js 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Host "SINTAXIS OK" } else { Write-Host "HAY ERROR" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host "--- logs mas recientes ---"; docker compose logs api-gateway --tail=10; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "--- prueba con Invoke-WebRequest ---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/ -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\): $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(docker compose exec api-gateway wget -qO- http://localhost:3000/ 2>&1)
